corrective_status: P5-CORR-001 resolved: billing rows now show vendor_id and booking_id.
P5-CORR-002 resolved at behavior level: invalid date ranges no longer submit refresh requests and show an invalid-range state.
P5-CORR-003 resolved: History entry and direct screen are gated by read_only_operational_views.
backend_confirmation: GET /api/billing/lines is the only verified JSON billing API.
GET /api/billing/lines requires query parameters named exactly from and to, both formatted YYYY-MM-DD.
GET /api/billing/lines returns from, to, rows, capacities, and count.
Each billing row contains vendor_id, vendor_name, booking_id, booked_date, generator_id, capacity_kva, and inventory_type.
GET /history exists only as an HTML page and requires read_only_operational_views.
No invoice, payment, or receipt API/model was verified.
static_check_context: flutter analyze --no-pub lib/features/billing/billing_screen.dart lib/features/history/history_screen.dart lib/app/router.dart lib/main.dart timed out locally after 180 seconds.
Text inspection found non-empty Dart switch cases without break/return/continue in lib/features/billing/billing_screen.dart.
Text inspection also found the same compile-safety pattern in previously approved lib/features/dashboard/dashboard_screen.dart.
Existing lib/features/generators/widgets/generator_list.dart shows the correct local pattern with break statements.

objective: Fix the remaining compile-safety blocker by terminating all non-empty Dart switch cases touched by the billing/dashboard UI color mapping.

behaviors: Do not change any API route, query parameter, DTO key, permission flag, or provider wiring.
Do not change dashboard/calendar API calls, data loading, permission gating, or navigation.
Do not change billing/history API behavior, permission gating, or navigation.
Do not add invoice, payment, receipt, or fake history data.

dashboard_phase_guard.reason_for_touching_dashboard: Compile-safety only. The dashboard file has Dart switch fallthrough in color mapping helpers and must be repaired without changing behavior.

required_fixes.problem: _buildInventoryTypeBadge has non-empty switch cases for retailer, permanent, and emergency that assign color but do not terminate with break/return/continue.
required_fixes.correct_behavior: Add break statements after each non-default color assignment, or rewrite the helper as an expression that returns a color without switch fallthrough.

required_fixes.problem: _buildMonitorCard and _buildTemperatureCard have non-empty switch cases that assign statusColor but do not terminate with break/return/continue.
required_fixes.correct_behavior: Apply the same compile-safety fix only to the statusColor switch mappings. Preserve the exact normal/high/critical/unknown color mapping and all dashboard/calendar behavior.

acceptance_criteria: Every non-empty switch case in lib/features/billing/billing_screen.dart terminates with break, return, throw, continue, or is replaced by an equivalent non-fallthrough expression.
Every non-empty switch case in lib/features/dashboard/dashboard_screen.dart terminates with break, return, throw, continue, or is replaced by an equivalent non-fallthrough expression.
The billing inventory color mapping remains: retailer blue, permanent green, emergency orange, default grey.
The dashboard monitor color mapping remains: normal green, high orange, critical red, default grey.
The dashboard temperature color mapping remains: normal green, high orange, critical red, unknown/default grey.
No API routes, DTOs, permission checks, providers, or navigation are changed.
No P1/P2/P3 booking, auth, generator, vendor, or directory behavior is changed.
